productDisplayName: Nike Men As Arsenal Co White Sweatshirts
description: Composition White hooded jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hemline, mock neck, drawstrings along the hood to create a customised Fit, embroidery on the chest, two kangaroo pockets and Arsenal Club badge above hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean If you're a true Gunners fan and you want to show your pride for Arsenal FC during the winter or cool season, this Arsenal sweatshirt from nike is for you! With this cool white color, there is the awesomeness of the Arsenal name and crest appliqué in addition to the classic nike swoosh. Team this with tracks and enjoy thise healthy runs in style.
